requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) vertical. Background cream (#FAF7F2). Center: stylized phone screen mockup showing a large bold number '7' in orange (#FF6B35) with small label 'day streak' below it. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'Build the day.' Below the phone, smaller text: 'One ritual at a time.' Bottom corner: 'Morning Ritual' wordmark. Aesthetic: clean, calm, premium wellness, the streak number is the hero element. No clutter, just a focused visual on the streak counter.
